Free technology grants and discounts available for nonprofits. Get started

Empower your staff with Surface

Surface and Microsoft 365 let your staff work from anywhere with devices protected by Microsoft security and manageability. Save up to 8% on select Surface devices.
Get started Contact sales

Collaborate and stay productive

From running secure Microsoft Teams meetings to collaborating on complex projects, Surface devices deliver remote working solutions designed to give staff the freedom to deliver your mission from anywhere.
Device solutions for nonprofits Surface for Business

Microsoft security and Surface

Stay secure and maintain control, from chip to cloud, with protection from Microsoft. Surface helps you mount proactive defenses with security built in.
Learn about endpoint protection

Simple deployment and unified management

Improve IT efficiency and reduce overhead and support costs. Surface devices optimize Microsoft software in the environments where your apps are stored and deployed, making it easier and more secure to utilize the tools that help you achieve your mission.
Learn about device management

Save up to 8% on select Surface devices*

Surface Laptop

Surface Laptops for work pair performance with premium design. Find the right fit with a choice of screen sizes, industry-leading keyboards, and security built in.
Get started Contact sales

Surface Pro

The iconic Kickstand transforms every Surface 2-in-1 from full touchscreen laptop with keyboard, portable tablet, digital canvas, to docked workstation.
Get started Contact sales

*Discount may vary by product and market. Please contact us for details.
Discounts of up to 40% off original retail price are available on select refurbished Surface devices in the United States and Canada.

Securing the Way for AI

This e-book explores the strategies and tools for building foundational device security so you can take advantage of the benefits of AI while maintaining integrity and trust in your systems.
Get the e-book
